    Class
    Description
    CertificateMessage
    Parses TLS Certificate message and extracts certificate chain with embedded SCTs.

    Configuration for building a TLS ClientHello message.
    ServerHello
    Full ServerHello message representation with ALL extensions captured.
    ServerKeyExchange
    Parsed ServerKeyExchange message for extracting key exchange parameters.
    ServerKeyExchange.KexType
     
    TlsException
    TLS-specific exception for TlsSocket operations.
    TlsExtension
    Container for a TLS extension type and its data.
